name: Ag Growth International Inc.
description: Ag Growth International Inc. (AGI) is a leading provider of equipment and technology solutions for global food infrastructure. AGI's product portfolio includes grain handling, storage, and conditioning equipment, as well as fertilizer handling and seed processing systems. The company serves agricultural customers worldwide, helping them store, blend, mix, convey, condition, and dry agricultural commodities. Headquartered in Winnipeg, Manitoba, Canada, AGI operates manufacturing facilities in Canada, the United States, Brazil, India, France, and Italy.
